testcase.name: test_partner_admin_login_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter132_provinces_renewal.py:131: in test_partner_admin_login_success assert r.status_code == 200, f"Partner admin login failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: Partner admin login failed: 401 {"detail":"Invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
